_note: Trimmed from a real https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/esummary.fcgi pull (db=pubmed) for three actual CHPS publications. Save as tests/fixtures/pubmed/sample-summaries.json.

42387281._case: ahead-of-print record — volume/issue/pages ALL empty strings, not null, even though this is a real fully-indexed PubMed article, not gray literature. Also has 11 authors, exercising full-author-list handling.
42387281.title: Limb Disuse Trials in Humans: Key Insights on Study Design, Ethics, and Project Execution.

42200906._case: SAME PAPER as one already in tests/fixtures/orcid/sample-works.json (DOI 10.3390/jfmk11020200) — real cross-source overlap. Use this DOI for the concrete merge test. volume/issue present but pages is an empty string (open-access journal uses article numbers via a companion field, not shown here as a traditional page range).
42200906.fulljournalname: Journal of functional morphology and kinesiology
42200906.title: A Comparison of Methods for Tracking Muscle Quality During Early-Phase Rehabilitation Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.

41740644._case: article-number-style pages ('150228', not a page range) on a real indexed-for-MEDLINE record. Also: Stock MS is NOT first author here (4th of 5) — exercises position-order preservation for a non-first-author case.
41740644.title: Examination and quantification of motor evoked potentials in the non-target resting leg.
